title: See all integrations in an account
excerpt: Is there a way for an admin to view all the active integrations across an account? I’d like to know what my users have enabled on their boards.

posts.author: kmcdaniel (Katie McDaniel)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way for an admin to view all the active integrations across an account? I’d like to know what my users have enabled on their boards.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there!

This isn’t available at the moment but if you have an Enterprise account, you could use the admin settings to disallow people on the account from setting up integrations.

This could help in case you’re worried about people setting up types of integrations that you don’t want to be enabled on the account.

I hope this helps!
